step_rationale: HDL structural apolipoprotein; altered composition in rupture-prone plaques affects lipid metabolism.
mechanism: An HDL apolipoprotein whose plaque levels and modification state correlate with atherosclerotic progression and plaque destabilization.

references.title: Personalized Nutrition Biomarkers and Dietary Strategies for Atherosclerosis Risk Management: A Systematic Review.
Quality Assurance for Multiplex Quantitative Clinical Chemistry Proteomics in Large Clinical Trials.
references.journal: The journal of applied laboratory medicine

references.title: The human HDL proteome displays high inter-individual variability and is altered dynamically in response to angioplasty-induced atheroma plaque rupture.
